description: Resolve issues with payment retries that are failing silently due to idempotency key collisions and race conditions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a payment retry scenario WHEN a payment fails THEN the retry should succeed without silent failures.

description: Fix the checkout crashes reported on mobile devices when switching payment methods to ensure a stable experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on mobile WHEN switching payment methods THEN the checkout should not crash.

description: Optimize the checkout API to reduce p95 latency from 1200ms to below 500ms to meet service level objectives.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the checkout API WHEN measured THEN the p95 latency should be less than 500ms.

description: Develop a one-click purchase flow for returning customers that utilizes saved payment methods to streamline the checkout process.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a returning customer with saved payment methods WHEN they initiate checkout THEN they should see a one-click purchase option that completes the transaction without additional steps.

description: Establish monitoring for the checkout conversion rate to track improvements post-implementation of new features.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring is in place WHEN users complete purchases THEN the checkout conversion rate should be tracked and reported.

description: Automatically detect and apply the best available coupon at checkout to reduce friction and improve conversion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user at checkout WHEN they have eligible coupons THEN the best coupon should be automatically applied to their order.

description: Migrate the payment processing to StripeConnect to reduce transaction fees and improve international support.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the migration is complete WHEN processing payments THEN transaction fees should be reduced by 0.3%.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Checkout Experience
description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback on the checkout experience to identify pain points and areas for improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is in place WHEN users complete a purchase THEN they should be prompted to provide feedback.

description: Provide users with visibility into coupon application processes to address concerns over auto-applying discounts.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is at checkout WHEN coupons are available THEN all options should be displayed clearly.

description: Implement detailed user journey analytics to capture user behavior throughout the checkout process.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the analytics tools are in place WHEN users navigate the checkout THEN their journey should be tracked and reported.

story_title: Implement User Segmentation for B2B Buyers
description: Create a tailored checkout experience for B2B buyers that prioritizes reliability and efficiency.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a B2B buyer is at checkout WHEN they complete their purchase THEN the process should prioritize reliability and efficiency.

description: Display real-time purchase activity badges during checkout (e.g., '23 people bought this in the last hour'). A/B tests on landing pages showed a 7% lift in click-through when social proof was present. Growth PM wants this rolled out to checkout flow.

12 customers reported being charged for orders that showed as 'payment failed' in the UI. Investigation shows the payment processor confirmed the charge but our system didn't receive the webhook callback due to a timeout. Refunds were issued manually but this erodes user trust.
